Hero.name: Hamidreza Fallahi
Hero.tagline: Building fast, scalable and SEO-friendly user interfaces
Hero.description: I focus on frontend engineering with React, Next.js and TypeScript, with experience building management panels, complex ERP systems, e-commerce platforms and production-grade PWA applications. I have worked on enterprise projects involving challenges such as Master-Detail forms, IndexedDB-based state management and scalable maintainable architectures.

experience.subtitle: Years of Professional Experience
experience.description: Frontend development for production systems including large-scale ERP platforms and complex management panels

projects.subtitle: Real-World Projects
projects.description: From complex ERP systems to e-commerce platforms and PWA applications

technical.subtitle: Focus on SEO & Performance
technical.description: Building fast, maintainable and SEO-friendly interfaces with modern architecture and server-side rendering

arianErp.title: Enterprise ERP System
arianErp.description: An ERP system for managing organizational processes including finance, human resources, production and logistics.
arianErp.problem: Handling a large number of list pages, forms, documents and custom pages with non-standard structures.
arianErp.solution: Implementing dynamic components for forms, lists and tables with a focus on scalability.
arianErp.role: Lead Developer responsible for architecture and development of dynamic system layers.

arianTech.title: Arian Tech Public Site
arianTech.description: A lightweight promotional website built for a large ERP web application without external libraries, focusing on speed and simplicity.
arianTech.problem: Implementing all interactions without installing additional libraries to improve website performance.
arianTech.solution: Using vanilla JavaScript to implement different sections and custom functionality.
arianTech.role: Lead Developer responsible for implementing server-side sections of the system.

media.storyBook: implementing a storybook component in it
media.mobile: show landing page as mobile device

candyRose.title: CandyRose Full-stack E-Commerce Platform
candyRose.description: A scalable e-commerce platform with essential features and a flexible architecture designed for future expansion.
candyRose.problem: Transforming a store into a marketplace where sellers can upload products with their own pricing, inventory and promotional rules including discount codes.
candyRose.solution: Separating entities and creating flexible relationships between tables to support marketplace features, promotions and discount management.
candyRose.role: Implemented all parts of this personal full-stack project.

About.title: Frontend development focused on scalability, user experience and code quality
About.paragraph1: My expertise is building complex and data-driven interfaces — especially ERP systems, enterprise panels and applications with Master-Detail forms, multi-level access control and real-time data flows.
About.paragraph2: My main stack includes Next.js, TypeScript, Redux Toolkit and RTK Query. I focus on performance optimization, offline capabilities with IndexedDB, SEO through server-side rendering and clean architecture for long-term maintainability.
About.paragraph3: If you need a frontend engineer who thinks beyond the UI layer — considering data flow, state architecture and product stability — let's talk.

persianRangePicker.name: Persian Range Picker
persianRangePicker.description: React date range picker supporting Jalali and Gregorian calendars
persianRangePicker.usageExample: Install via npm install persian-range-picker and import directly into your React component.

Experience.title: My experience is focused on products that need to work reliably in real environments

erp.description: Building large-scale ERP interfaces with complex Master-Detail forms, multi-level access control and dynamic operational modules. Using Redux Toolkit, RTK Query and IndexedDB for high performance, offline support and maintainable state architecture.

ecommerce.description: Developing online stores and web applications with Next.js and ASP.NET Core, focusing on SSR for SEO, PWA for offline access and clean scalable architecture.

opensource.description: Building and maintaining React components and frontend tools with focus on developer experience, reliability in real-world applications and clean API design.

architecture.items: Clean Architecture, DDD, Master-Detail, SSR, Reusable Components

OpenSource.title: Open source is not just coding for me; it is part of my professional identity

project.title: react-persian-range-picker
project.description: A lightweight and fully typed date range picker supporting both Jalali and Gregorian calendars. Built with React and TypeScript — ready for real-world enterprise applications.
project.tags: React, TypeScript, Jalali Calendar, Open Source

Contact.title: Need a frontend engineer who delivers production-ready code?
Contact.description: Available for projects involving complex management panels, ERP systems, data-driven dashboards and frontend performance optimization. Experienced with React, Next.js and scalable state architectures.
